C5.note: Paper PMID 27476956 (Homeyer & Gohlke 2012) is the MM-PBSA methodology review; answer key expects bare PB ~-24, NMODE -TdS ~+18 -> approaches -6. Agent: -TdS=+16.93 (matches ~+18); PB no-entropy -17.10 (less negative than ~-24); PB+entropy -0.17 (vs expt -6.5, over-corrected by ~6); GB+entropy -13.70. Correct dramatic-improvement trend and entropy magnitude reproduced, but absolute PB endpoint lands ~6 kcal/mol off and bare PB less negative than key.
